$comment: Optional dependencies for the JPEG XL graphics tier and the libsndfile OGG-music tier, resolved by vcpkg in manifest mode. This file is only consulted when CMake is configured with the vcpkg toolchain (-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=.../vcpkg.cmake); a plain cmake build (what build.bat does, via -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH into a classic-mode vcpkg prefix) ignores it. See COMPILING.md. The *nix build normally uses system libjxl + libsndfile via pkg-config instead and needs none of this. NOTE: the MinGW-GCC libsndfile vendored in 3rdp/ (for SyncTERM) cannot link into this MSVC door -- an MSVC-native build (vcpkg, here) is required. Mirrors src/doors/syncdoom/vcpkg.json and src/doors/syncduke/vcpkg.json.
name: syncconquer
description: Command & Conquer: Red Alert for Synchronet / SyncTERM (DOOR32.SYS BBS door)
